decks.notes: The deck focuses on the powerful combo of Show and Tell paired with Sneak Attack to bring out game-ending creatures like Emrakul, the Aeons Torn and Atraxa, Grand Unifier. With the help of cards like Omniscience and Force of Will to protect the combo, the deck aims to quickly overwhelm opponents with massive threats. The mana base is designed to support the combo efficiently, with cards like City of Traitors and Ancient Tomb to accelerate the game plan. Overall, the deck is centered around exploiting the synergy between Show and Tell and powerful creatures to secure victory.

The main concept of this deck is to control the game by countering threats, disrupting opponent's plans with cards like Force of Will and Stifle, and managing the board with cards like Swords to Plowshares and Wasteland. The deck focuses on card advantage and card selection, utilizing cards like Brainstorm and Ponder to find key pieces. It also includes powerful planeswalkers like Tamiyo, Inquisitive Student and Teferi, Time Raveler to further control the game. Overall, the deck aims to outvalue and outmaneuver the opponent to gain control of the game and secure victory.

The deck focuses on quickly assembling the Aluren combo to cheat out powerful creatures like Emrakul, the Aeons Torn and Acererak the Archlich. It includes cards like Ancient Tomb and Lotus Petal to ramp up mana, as well as Brainstorm and Ponder for card selection and draw. Force of Will is included for protection, while cards like Show and Tell and Omniscience help get big threats onto the battlefield. Atraxa, Grand Unifier and Formidable Speaker provide additional support and synergy within the deck. The goal is to overwhelm the opponent with powerful creatures and win the game quickly.

The deck focuses on utilizing efficient spells and creatures to disrupt the opponent's game plan and maintain control of the tempo. By combining powerful disruptive spells like Force of Will and Daze with aggressive creatures like Dragon's Rage Channeler and Murktide Regent, the deck aims to consistently apply pressure while also disrupting the opponent's strategy. The mana base is streamlined to support the fast-paced gameplay, with spells like Lightning Bolt and Boomerang Basics providing additional utility and flexibility. Overall, the deck aims to outpace and outmaneuver the opponent to secure a quick victory.

The main focus of this deck is to quickly deploy powerful dragon creatures and disruptive spells to control the game and limit the opponent's options. By using powerful cards like Chalice of the Void, Blood Moon, and Sundering Eruption alongside aggressive creatures like Pyrogoyf and Broadside Bombardiers, the deck aims to apply pressure early and maintain control of the board. The inclusion of cards like Simian Spirit Guide and Chrome Mox allow for explosive starts, while cards like Hexing Squelcher and Fury provide additional disruption and removal options.

This deck focuses on quickly filling the graveyard with powerful creatures like Griselbrand and Archon of Cruelty, and then bringing them back to the battlefield using cards like Reanimate and Animate Dead. The strategy is to combo off by rapidly reanimating big threats, disrupting the opponent with cards like Cabal Therapy and Thoughtseize, and overwhelming them with powerful creatures. The deck also utilizes cards like Lotus Petal and Dark Ritual to ramp up mana quickly and efficiently. Overall, the deck aims to win the game by overwhelming the opponent with big, hard-to-deal-with threats early on.

The deck focuses on quickly disrupting the opponent's plans while maintaining pressure with efficient early creatures and burn spells. Through a combination of countermagic, removal, and tempo plays, it aims to control the game while building a board presence. The key strategy involves using low-cost spells and creatures to maintain a fast pace and overwhelm the opponent before they can stabilize. By utilizing card selection and disruption, the deck aims to keep the opponent on the back foot and prevent them from executing their game plan effectively.

The deck focuses on utilizing creatures with different abilities and types to overwhelm the opponent quickly. It includes creatures with abilities that can disrupt the opponent's game plan and efficiently deal damage. The mana base is designed to support the diverse range of creatures and ensure consistent mana production. The inclusion of Umori, the Collector as a companion adds an extra layer of synergy and efficiency. Overall, the deck aims to apply early pressure and maintain a strong board presence to outpace the opponent and secure victories.

This Bant Aggro deck focuses on utilizing the powerful companion Yorion, Sky Nomad to create a value engine with flicker effects like Ephemerate and Teferi, Time Raveler. The deck aims to control the board with removal like Swords to Plowshares and Force of Will while also pressuring the opponent with efficient threats like Noble Hierarch and Ice-Fang Coatl. The deck also has access to versatile toolbox cards like Green Sun's Zenith and Spellseeker to adapt to different matchups. Ultimately, the deck aims to overwhelm the opponent with a combination of disruption and efficient creatures.

The deck aims to quickly assemble a combination of cards that can win the game in one explosive turn, typically on the first or second turn. By using rituals and other fast mana, the deck can generate enough mana to cast a spell like Balustrade Spy or Undercity Informer, which mills the entire deck into the graveyard. This triggers either Dread Return or Thassa's Oracle to win the game on the spot. The deck is highly reliant on its combo pieces and needs to carefully navigate disruption from opposing decks to execute its game plan successfully.

This deck focuses on aggressive gameplay utilizing low-cost, efficient creatures like Delver of Secrets and Dragon's Rage Channeler, backed up by counterspells like Force of Will to protect its threats. The deck also utilizes cantrips like Ponder and Brainstorm to filter through the deck quickly and find the necessary pieces. Wasteland is included to disrupt the opponent's mana base, while cards like Lightning Bolt and Unholy Heat provide additional removal options. The deck aims to apply pressure early and maintain control of the game through a combination of aggression and disruption.

In this Legacy Aggro - Dimir Tempo deck, the key strategy revolves around disrupting your opponent's game plan with cards like Thoughtseize, Daze, and Wasteland while staying proactive and applying pressure with efficient creatures like Orcish Bowmasters and powerful planeswalkers like Tamiyo, Inquisitive Student. The deck also utilizes powerful disruptive spells like Force of Will and Fatal Push to keep the opponent on edge. The goal is to control the tempo of the game by disrupting your opponent's plays while attacking with a mix of creatures and spells to secure victory.

The main idea of this Grixis Control deck is to disrupt the opponent's game plan by using a combination of counterspells, hand disruption, and removal spells. The deck aims to control the board and outvalue the opponent with card advantage. Additionally, the deck includes a few threats like Brazen Borrower and Kaito, Bane of Nightmares to close out the game. The deck also has some graveyard recursion options like Reanimate and Cling to Dust for added flexibility. Overall, the deck focuses on controlling the game and outmaneuvering the opponent to secure victory.

The main concept of this deck is to utilize artifact creatures and synergies in order to quickly overwhelm the opponent with aggressive plays. This deck focuses on using cards like Emry, Lurker of the Loch and Urza's Bauble to generate constant value and keep the pressure on the opponent. With a mix of counter spells like Force of Will and disruptive cards like Pithing Needle, this deck aims to disrupt the opponent's game plan while deploying threats and closing out the game swiftly.

The deck aims to quickly and relentlessly combo off by using a combination of cards that allow the player to quickly mill their entire library and win the game through alternate win conditions such as Thassa's Oracle or Laboratory Maniac. The deck includes a variety of fast mana sources, tutors, and protection spells to ensure the combo can go off as quickly and consistently as possible. The key strategy revolves around setting up the combo pieces while managing resources effectively to win before the opponent can disrupt the combo.

This deck aims to quickly assemble the combo of Doomsday and Thassa's Oracle to win the game on the spot. The deck is built around efficient card selection and protection spells to ensure the combo can be executed smoothly. It also includes disruptive elements like Thoughtseize and Force of Will to disrupt the opponent's game plan. The inclusion of cards like Murktide Regent and Tamiyo, Inquisitive Student provide additional value and alternate win conditions if needed. The key strategy is to carefully plan and execute the Doomsday combo while keeping the opponent off balance with disruption.
